title: Oprah Announces Memoir, 'The Life You Want,' and Book Imprint
text:
# Oprah Announces Inspirational Memoir and Book Imprint

_The Life You Want_ reveals never-before told stories from Oprah's experience and shines a light on how they can inform your life

Flatiron Books announced today it will publish an exclusive memoir from global media leader and philanthropist Oprah Winfrey titled _The Life You Want_ , a book that uses her own story as the source of inspirational advice. Winfrey said, "All of my experiences, even the painful ones, have been there to teach me something about life. I’m still learning and I hope my story inspires other people to live the highest, fullest expression of themselves."  
  
_The Life You Want_ reveals never-before told stories from her own experience and shines a light on how anyone can put their life on a new trajectory.  
  
The book, which is scheduled for publication in January, 2017, will be the lead title in her as-yet-unnamed book imprint, which is expected to include several non-fiction titles per year, chosen personally by Oprah.  
  
_The Life You Want_ , and the imprint titles, will be published by Flatiron Books, a division of Macmillan US. Bob Miller, president and publisher of Flatiron Books, said, "We're deeply honored to publish _The Life You Want_ , which is such a remarkable combination of Oprah's life story and the lessons we can all draw from it for our personal growth. We're also thrilled to give a home to Oprah's imprint titles. We all know how extraordinary Oprah's instincts are when it comes to choosing books, instincts borne of her lifelong love of reading and the power of the written word."  
  
Pan Macmillan in the UK, Australia, South Africa and India are absolutely thrilled to be joining forces with Bob Miller at Flatiron Books to publish the long-awaited memoir by one of the world's truly iconic superstars.
Anthony Forbes Watson, MD at Pan Macmillan, said, "Oprah is astonishing. There is no other word for her. _The Life You Want_ will be a landmark publishing event. Everyone at Pan Macmillan is in awe of what Oprah has achieved in her life, and this memoir and guide promises to be an inspiration around the world."  
  
Robin Harvie, Non Fiction Publisher, will publish _The Life You Want_ simultaneously in January, 2017.  
  
Oprah Winfrey is represented by Jennifer Rudolph Walsh of WME, who negotiated on her behalf.  
  
Flatiron Books is a division of Macmillan. For more information please contact Flatiron Books Publicity Director, Marlena Bittner at (646) 307-5078/marlena.bittner@flatironbooks.com.  
  
**About Macmillan**  
_Macmillan Publishers is a global trade publishing company, owned by Verlagsgruppe Georg von Holtzbrinck, with imprints in the United States, Germany, the United Kingdom, Australia, South Africa, and around the world. U.S. publishers include Farrar, Straus and Giroux; Flatiron Books; Henry Holt and Company; Picador; St. Martin’s Press; Tor/Forge; Macmillan Audio; and Macmillan Children’s Publishing Group. Macmillan Publishers is based in New York City, with many of our publishers located in the historic Flatiron Building._

Published 12/03/2015
